input.tenant_message: The dishwasher started leaking from the bottom door seal during the wash cycle. There's water pooling on the kitchen floor every time I run it so I've stopped using it for now. I wiped it up but I'm concerned the water is seeping under the flooring — you can see the laminate starting to bubble a little near the front. Wanted to report it right away.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule an appliance technician to inspect and replace the dishwasher door gasket/seal within 3–5 days. Assess the laminate flooring for water damage and determine if subfloor remediation is needed. Advise tenant not to run the dishwasher until repairs are complete.
